name: BB:HostDefinition: RPC Servers
notes: Edit this BB to define typical RPC servers. This BB is used in conjunction with the BB:False Positive: RPC Server False Positives Categories and BB:FalsePositve: RPC Server False Positive Events building blocks.

conditions_text: when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:PortDefinition: RPC Ports
when the destination IP is one of the following 127.0.0.2
